Now selling

The Ridings

The Ridings is a composed private enclave designed around generous plots, mature planting and quietly confident architecture. Each home pairs traditional proportions with contemporary glazing, calm interiors and flexible family space.

Chandlers Ford, Hampshire

A collection of 4 and 5 bedroom homes surrounded by open green space.

Homes
14 detached homes
Bedrooms
4 and 5 bedrooms
Price guide
From GBP 895,000

Why it works

Designed around daily life, long-term value and place.

Kingsvale homes are planned from the outside in: approach, light, privacy, storage, garden access and everyday flow are resolved before the decorative layer is added.

  • Private landscaped setting close to Chandlers Ford village amenities.
  • High-performance fabric, air source heating and EV-ready parking.
  • Open-plan kitchen, dining and garden rooms with separate quiet lounges.
  • Bespoke joinery, stone worktops and carefully curated brassware packages.
